name: Green Tomato Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 to 3 pounds green tomatoes, mature but not turning
3/4 cup firmly packed light brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees.
2. Dip the green tomatoes in boiling water, then into cold water. Peel and cut each tomato into quarters. Remove as many seeds as possible from each quarter.
3. Slice the tomatoes slightly and drain them on a paper towel-lined plate.
4. In a large bowl, mix together the sugars, tapioca, spices (cinnamon, nutmeg, allspice), salt, orange peel, and orange juice until well combined.
5. Allow the mixture to set for 15 minutes before adding the tomatoes.
6. Place the prepared filling into an unbaked pie shell. Dot with butter.
7. Top with the remaining crust and make small slits in the top to allow steam to escape.
8. Bake on the lowest oven rack for 45 to 60 minutes, or until the tomatoes are cooked. Let cool on a wire rack for 90 minutes before serving.
Makes: 1 9-inch pie.
